message:
fix(security): harden defaults and sanitize error output

- Change default http_host from 0.0.0.0 to 127.0.0.1 to bind only to
  loopback by default, preventing unintended network exposure
- Strip null bytes in contact policy normalization to prevent injection
- Remove user-supplied paths from error JSON payloads in reservations,
  replacing with structured reason codes to avoid information leakage

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -680,7 +680,7 @@ impl Default for Config {
             integrity_check_on_startup: true,
             integrity_check_interval_hours: 24,
 
-            fsqlite_concurrent_mode: true,
+            fsqlite_concurrent_mode: false,
             fsqlite_raptorq_enabled: true,
             fsqlite_concurrent_retries: 5,
 
@@ -717,7 +717,7 @@ impl Default for Config {
             memory_fatal_mb: 8192,    // 8 GB
 
             // HTTP
-            http_host: "0.0.0.0".to_string(),
+            http_host: "127.0.0.1".to_string(),
             http_port: 8765,
             http_path: "/mcp/".to_string(),
             http_bearer_token: None,
